MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-14-2010 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-14-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 218, Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; Not Reported.
Appearances:
PlaintiffEugene A. Vlahos, Esq. for and with the Plaintiff: John B. Vlahos.
Nathan A. Metcalf, Esq., through limited scope, for and with the Defendant(s): Nilesh Prasad and Evan Jennings.
This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
The Judge Pro Tem: Don Sullivan, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions in room 304-B.
The parties enter into a signed agreement "Stipulation for entry of judgment", which was filed.
Case settled, TRIAL DATE vacated.
